title: Aurora Palm Pals, Busky The Husky Dog, Soft Toy, 33474, 5 inches, Grey and White
features: Part of Aurora's Palm Pal collection
Adorable Husky dog cuddly toy that is filled with beans
Perfect gift for anyone who loves Huskies
description: This little Husky dog fits in the palm of the hand, he is full of beans which makes him super soft and squishy. His coat is grey and white all over And he has a cute little button nose. This little Husky has the cutest little smile which brings a smile to the face of everyone he meets. Palm Pals make great gifts for any occasion, Whether it is for A birthday, Christmas or as a just because gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable palm pal Collect them all with 11 other adorable characters available.
